rules.trigger_condition: Hold 20 shares; do not add. If NVDA reclaims 218-220, continue holding. If NVDA breaks below 212, reassess whether to reduce 5 shares or reduce SOXL further.
rules.intended_action: hold unless 212 break forces risk review
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: order-detail screenshot required before recording any reduction
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not add NVDA during this checkpoint; use NVDA weakness as a SOXL risk input.

rules.current_observed_value: holding page about 261.550; watchlist/external quote about 280.54
rules.trigger_condition: No new add. Because of quote-source conflict, action must use executable order-ticket bid/ask only. If executable SOXL price is below 270, sell 2 shares. If executable SOXL price is below 260, close remaining SOXL. If SOXL rebounds strongly but NVDA remains weak, consider selling 2 shares to lock historical leveraged profit.
rules.trigger_level: 270 soft risk-reduction line; 260 hard close line; order-ticket quote required
rules.intended_action: use SOXL as main U.S. risk-reduction valve after executable quote confirmation
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: order-ticket bid/ask plus order-detail screenshot required
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not execute from untagged holding-page, watchlist, after-hours, or external quote values.

rules.trigger_condition: No GOOG add and no GGLL add. GOOG around/below 355 triggers GGLL caution. If GOOG cannot reclaim 358-360, prepare to sell 5 shares of GGLL. If GOOG breaks below 352, sell 5-10 shares of GGLL. If GOOG rebounds to 365-370, consider selling 5 shares of GGLL on strength.
rules.trigger_level: GOOG 355 caution, 358-360 reclaim, 352 break, 365-370 rebound sale zone
rules.intended_action: prepare GGLL risk reduction only after confirmation
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: order-detail screenshot required before recording GGLL sale
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not reinterpret GOOG weakness as an add signal.

rules.trigger_condition: No add. If INTC rebounds to 116, consider selling 5 shares. If INTC rebounds to 118-120, sell 5 or all. If INTC falls below 108, reassess direct cleanup.
rules.trigger_level: 116 partial cleanup, 118-120 stronger cleanup, 108 weakness reassessment
rules.intended_action: observe until rebound or weakness line confirms cleanup
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: order-detail screenshot required before recording cleanup
rules.rule_drift_prevention: No add while below recovery band.

rules.trigger_condition: No add. GLD 405 remains the risk line. If GLD breaks below 405, close UGL first. If GLD rebounds to 410-412, consider selling UGL on strength.
rules.trigger_level: GLD 405 risk line; 410-412 rebound sale zone
rules.intended_action: use UGL as gold-risk reduction valve if GLD loses 405
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: order-detail screenshot required before recording UGL close
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not add GLD or UGL during cleanup phase.

rules.trigger_condition: No buy below 75,500. If BTC stabilizes above 75,500-76,000, buy first 300 USDT. If confirmation holds, buy second 300 USDT. If breakout fails, cancel buyback.
rules.intended_action: no BTC buyback until stabilization and confirmation
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: manual confirmation and order evidence required
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not buy BTC below the stabilization zone.

rules.trigger_condition: No add to ETH, SOL, or DOGE.
rules.execution_evidence_requirement: new order evidence required before any runtime execution record
rules.rule_drift_prevention: Do not expand crypto risk while BTC trigger is inactive.

rules.trigger_condition: No grid reopening, no chase, residual ZEC can be converted later if needed.
